name: babel-site
description: Static source for alexnava.me. Built with esbuild into a generated dist/ payload for Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.preview: npm run build:dist && wrangler pages dev dist --port 4173
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build:dist && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=alexnava-me --branch=preview
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:dist && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=alexnava-me
